transcript.text: One of the back-to-back mornings.
This meeting is being recorded.
How are you doing?
I'm doing well.
How are you?
I'm good, good.
It's a busy afternoon here.
So, yeah, also back-to-back in a way.
Yeah.
So I know what you mean.
Cool.
Yeah, thank you for joining.
And I think, like, I don't have many updates for today as we are wrapping up, but I just want to make sure that we are addressing everything.
You know, like, as we take things closer to the finish line.
So I wanted to update you about what we have in Pipeline.
So it's a mix of refreshes plus three net new.
So these three net new will land in the Vue new blog posts published after October 25th.
So just for your information that our ops team will export you, you know, on the very last day of our collaboration.
So everything is, you know.
Yeah.
So we have one buffer article, will also publish this one, related to your product, which is always a good refresh to have.
And then this batch of eight articles is on Alex's side.
I don't know how you want to manage it, so you can tell me whether you want to pause this, or whether you would like to sync with Alex and figure out how to approach this review.
Because there are many good topics that could potentially benefit Spike Now alternatives.
So probably like conversion-focused are worth considering and, you know, taking it to the finish line.
Right.
Yeah, Alex is on parental leave part two right now for a couple of weeks.
So I'll have to follow up with his team and see who is covering this in his absence.
Because, actually, I think he's… you.
Back before our agreement is up.
I think he's back on February 9th.
So worst case, we'll get a clear answer then.
But yeah, I don't know like how much progress he's made in reviewing it and if he has delegated it to any of his team members in his absence.
So I can at least, you know, attempt to do some due diligence internally.
And then like worst case, we can follow up when he has returned.
Okay, perfect.
So I'll add it to our ops personalities to the list because I'll be out of office between 5th and 9th and 20th.
So it'll be like two business weeks.
But yeah, like no worries.
Like these are waiting for you anyway.
And we have, you know, a specific folder for Superhuman.
So you can also get access to this folder.
Right.
And then we could actually export.
So there is like, you know, it's basically working at this rate.
So you have all the docs in one export.
And I believe I already have access to the folder, content production.
Yeah.
I think that's what I'm looking at right now.
It just has a collection of Google Docs in it, correct?
Mm-hmm.
Okay.
Yeah.
I can just share my screen.
Yeah, you should.
I'll just check in whether someone else should have access to it.
So let me know if should add anyone else.
Myself, Alex.
Here, I can put it in chat.
Oh, my goodness.
Oh, goodness.
Oh, my goodness.
Oh, Thank you.
I just want to like overdo it rather than underdo it, so.
Okay, let's go with this list.
Would you Slack me?
Oh, yes, I can Slack it to you for sure.
Or, you know, is it like, okay.
Yeah, that would be, that would be a good.
Sure, we're going to try it.
I don't I'm trying to.
know.
I'll...
I don't know.
I think there's moment.
Okay.
Okay.
Done.
Okay, perfect.
I'll add all these folks to the folder.
Actually, is it also possible to transfer ownership of that folder so that we can share it with anyone else in the future?
I think you should be able to copy it or download it and then re-upload it to, yeah.
Okay.
Let me know if it works this way.
If not, we'll find another way.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Yeah, you can, you can move it according to the permissions that I'm using, so it'd be easy to be fine.
So, sorry, what?
So, according to the permissions that I'm sharing, so Canon Manager permission lets you move this folder.
Okay.
So you can, you can try, you can also copy, you know, either way, it's fine.

Cool, and, yeah, generally speaking, so, like, what I'm seeing is, like, a pretty good growth related to, like, Refresh program that we were running since a couple of months, so I can send you, like, a very quick summary, close it to our end of collaboration, what were the results, if you are interested, it's optional, so it's only up to you.
And then, what else?
Yeah, it's, like, if I may ask, like, what are your plans for the Canon team moving forward?
Like, how it plays.
If thinking about content after end of our collaboration.
Yeah, so we have one of my team members is going to be focusing on mail and calendar topical content.
And there will be a few things that need to happen.

We need to kind of adapt some of our existing content that we already have for Superhuman, and potentially adapt some of the legacy mail content to, like, broader Superhuman positioning, and then address any topical gaps with, you know, net new content creation.
So those are kind of our, I guess, like, adapt existing content from various web properties for our new, like, paradigm on Superhuman.com is one bucket, and then net new topical content development.
Okay, yeah, yeah, it makes sense.
And I know, like, so
So far, what you shared, like, you're not switching to another agency, but, like, you'll be using our apps internally with the team.
So is there any good timeline for us to reconnect and just check in how things are going, whether you need any support, like, let's say, this year, or is it something that you're interested in?
I just don't know.
I just don't think our budget is going to allow for it in this calendar year.
So, you know, maybe in the future, but I think for just, like, for the fiscal year 27, I think it's just not in the cards, unfortunately.
Okay, okay, okay.
It makes all sense.
Cool.
Do you have anything else to add or any question?
No, I do think that performance data would be helpful that you referenced, so that would be great to have.
Okay.
Right.
Right.
Okay.
And I'll make sure I'm able to kind of download the files and all that ahead of the 17th.
You'll, you know, the export of all the documentation will be really great.
I think that covers it.
And I'll get back to you on if Alex has made any progress on reviewing that content.
Okay, okay, perfect.
Yeah, it makes sense.
Yeah, I'll prepare you a performance report summary with some highlights.
I usually do, you know, like just check when you need sessions versus engaged sessions.
You didn't like track conversion specifically, so we won't get into this.
Also, I'll export to any visibility in Scrunch, so you'll be able to see, you know, where do you land.
And you have already the comments, or like you have.
All

You'll get the common strategy, so this is the latest version, and we merged some of the clusters, so this should help you also see how we were thinking about the strategy, defined SEO, and all of visibility as well.
Sounds good.
Cool, and yeah, so I know Jess, we didn't have a chance to collaborate in a regular engagement, but it was a pleasure.
Even for a brief while, and yeah, good luck with the whole, you know, Superhuman team and the whole acquisition.
I know it's been a challenge, but it probably was a good thing to have to figure things out, so yeah, it was a pleasure working with you and the whole, you know, Superhuman team.
If I don't have a chance to chat with Alex or Morgan, you know, send, like, thank you their way from our team.

Yeah, likewise, it's been a pleasure getting to know the GrowthX team, and I know the mail team really appreciates y'all, and I just really appreciate everything that you've done to make this transition smooth, and I hope that you have an excellent vacation.
Thank you so much.
Yeah, so chat soon, and I'll be waiting for your message, and I'll drop some recording.
Perfect.
Sounds good.
Thanks, Jo.
Bye.
bye-bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize project handoff and close out the Superhuman \<\> GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Final Content Pipeline:** 3 net-new articles (post-Oct 25), 1 product refresh, and 8 articles awaiting review.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [**Review Blocker:** The 8 articles are stalled pending review from Alex, who is on parental leave until Feb 9.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Handoff Plan:** GrowthX will export all content docs and a performance summary by the Jan 17 contract end date.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Future Engagement:** No new agency work is planned for FY27 due to budget constraints.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Topics

### Final Content Pipeline & Review Blocker

  - [**Pipeline Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [**3 Net-New Articles:** To be published on the Superhuman blog (post-Oct 25).](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [**1 Product Refresh Article:** A buffer article for ongoing value.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [**8 Articles Awaiting Review:** This batch is blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Blocker → Alex's Parental Leave:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [**Context:** Alex is on leave until Feb 9.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [**Action:** Jess will check if the review was delegated; otherwise, it will wait until Alex returns.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

### Handoff & Data Export

  - [**Content Folder Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Action:** Jo will grant "Can Manager" access to the shared folder for the team list Jess provides.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This permission allows Superhuman to move the folder into their own drive, ensuring full ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Final Data Export:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will export all documentation on the final day of the collaboration (Jan 17).](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
          - [Performance summary (sessions, visibility, Scrunch data).](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
          - [Latest content strategy document.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Future Content Strategy & Collaboration

  - [**Superhuman's Internal Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [A team member will focus on mail/calendar topical content.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
        1.  [Adapt existing Superhuman content.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
        2.  [Adapt legacy mail content for the new Superhuman.com positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
        3.  [Create net-new content to fill topical gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Future Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Status:** No new agency work is budgeted for FY27.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a budget-driven decision.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jess:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Provide the team list to Jo for folder access.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Investigate the review status of the 8 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Confirm the ability to download all content before Jan 17.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Grant folder access to the provided team list.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Prepare and export the performance summary and content strategy doc.](https://fathom.video/share/w_EYA2N9VtsmtW-KyrMjNFTRRcjLzx6t?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

action_items.description: Follow up w/ Alex's team re: 8-article review; update Jo
Add Jess's Slack list to Superhuman folder; then Jess test move/copy
Prepare and send Jess performance summary + Scrunch visibility + latest strategy doc
